request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Write a 2-3 sentence storyline summary (≤500 chars total) of the regulatory pressure history for this prediction-market contract. For 'retrospective' kind, write past tense and reference the actual resolution. For 'active' kind, write present tense and note what's still pending. Return JSON {text: ...}.
request.user:
Contract: Will the SEC approve a spot Solana ETF in 2025?
Kind: retrospective
Timeline (5 events):
- 2025-12-23 [background] Commission Opinion and Adjudicatory Order - Amergent Hospitality Group Inc. — Enforcement order against unrelated Amergent Hospitality Group has no bearing on SEC spot‑SOL ETF approvals; no change in probability.
- 2025-12-23 [background] Litigation Release - David Hudzik — Litigation release names SEC staff but gives no indication it's about spot SOL ETF approvals or relevant exchange rule orders, so it doesn't change odds.
- 2025-12-17 [background] PDF Version — CFTC PDF mentions the SEC but contains no SEC approval or exchange order for a spot Solana ETF, so it doesn't change resolution odds.
- 2024-09-12 [background] eToro Reaches Settlement with SEC and Will Cease Trading Activity in Nearly All Crypto Assets — SEC settlement with eToro signals stricter enforcement toward crypto, lowering odds the SEC will approve a spot SOL ETF.
- 2024-09-12 [background] Order - eToro — An SEC enforcement order against eToro is general crypto enforcement news and does not materially affect the likelihood of a 2025 spot Solana ETF approval.

response.text: An SEC settlement with eToro in Sept 2024 signaled stricter crypto enforcement, weighing on odds for a 2025 spot SOL ETF. Through 2025, only unrelated SEC/CFTC actions appeared and no exchange rule approval emerged; the SEC did not approve a spot Solana ETF in 2025, so the contract resolved No.
